name: Murky
description: Not quite a full Hero, Murky can place an Egg to respawn quickly back into battle.
title: Baby Murloc
info: Mrgglglbrlg rmrmgllg mrggggm. Mrrglglgy, mgllglgl mgggrrmgl? MRGGGLGLLM! Mrrggllgggllggll mrrglrlg mrrg mrrg mrrrg.

Murky.name: Slime
Murky.description: Deal 86 (+4% per level) damage and apply Slime on nearby enemies for 6 seconds, Slowing them by 20%.  Deal 210 (+4% per level) damage to enemies who are already Slimed. Structures take 50% damage.

Murky.name: Pufferfish
Murky.description: Spit out a Pufferfish with 225 (+5.5% per level) health at the target point. After 2.75 seconds, the fish will blow up for 330 (+4% per level) damage. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Quest: Kill Slimed Enemies or hit them with Pufferfish. Heroes and Structures award 4 bonus stacks.  Reward: After obtaining 200 stacks, Murky's Basic Abilities no longer deal reduced damage to structures.  Mythic Reward: After obtaining 400 stacks, Murky's health is increased by 50%.

Murky.name: Safety Bubble
Murky.description: Becomes Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While active, Murky cannot attack or use abilities.

Murky.name: March of the Murlocs
Murky.description: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.

Murky.name: Octo-Grab
Murky.description: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.

Murky.name: Spawn Egg
Murky.description: Place an Egg at target location, revealing the nearby area. Upon dying, Murky respawns at the Egg after 8 seconds. Murky only grants 25% of a real Hero's experience upon dying.  If Murky's Egg is killed, he is revealed to enemies for 15 seconds, and Spawn Egg is placed on cooldown.

1.name: Fish Eye
1.description: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to 45% for 5 seconds.  Passive: Increase the Egg's Health by 100%, its sight radius by 300%, and it reveals all enemies in its sight radius.

1.name: Shell Game
1.description: Murky can now place 2 Eggs and will randomly revive from them, however, the cooldown of placing an Egg is increased by 15 seconds.

1.name: A Fishy Deal
1.description: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.

4.name: Slime Time
4.description: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.

4.name: Tufferfish
4.description: Pufferfish gains 50 Spell Armor and deals 50% more damage to Slimed targets.

4.name: Living the Dream
4.description: Quest: Every 15 seconds Murky is alive, he gains 5% Spell Power, up to 25%. This bonus is reset upon his death.

7.name: Slippery When Wet
7.description: Gain 50% Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

7.name: Time to Krill
7.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 7 (+4% per level) damage a second and slow the target by 7% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

10.name: March of the Murlocs
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.

10.name: Octo-Grab
10.description: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.

13.name: Rejuvenating Bubble
13.description: Safety Bubble restores 40% of Murky's maximum Health.

13.name: Egg Shell
13.description: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to 50% of Murky's current Health.

13.name: Fish Tank
13.description: Murky is healed for 20% of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.

16.name: Toxic Buildup
16.description: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.

16.name: Fish Oil
16.description: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.

16.name: Wrath of Cod
16.description: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to 16% of their maximum Health over 4 seconds.

20.name: Never-Ending Murlocs
20.description: March of the Murlocs can be channeled indefinitely, and will always last its base duration when canceled early.  In addition, it no longer deals reduced damage to Structures.

20.name: ... And a Shark Too!
20.description: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by 13700% (+4% per level).

20.name: Making Inky
20.description: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by 1.5 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.MurkyAFishyDeal: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MurkyAFishyDealSubtractTokenCount,Value"/></c> stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.<n/><n/>Maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyAFishyDealTokenCounter,Max"/></c> stacks of Bribe.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyEggHuntTalent: Murky can now place <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Eggs and will randomly revive from them, however, the cooldown of placing an Egg is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyEggShell: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,MurkyEggShellRespawnEggAmountAccumulator,Ratio*100"/>%</c> of Murky's current Health.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyFishEye: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyFishEyeMountSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyFishEyeMountSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the Egg's Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,MurkySpawnEggFishEyeTalentBuff,Modification.VitalMaxAdditiveMultiplierArray[Life]"/>%</c>, its sight radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,MurkySpawnEggFishEyeTalentBuff,Modification.SightBonus)/(Unit,MurkyRespawnEgg,Sight)"/>%</c>, and it reveals all enemies in its sight radius.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyFishOil: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyFishTank: Murky is healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MurkySlimeDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyLivingTheDreamTalent: Quest: Every seconds Murky is alive, he gains % Spell Power, up to %. This bonus is reset upon his death.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyMakingInky: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MurkyMakingInky,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyMarchOfTheMurlocs: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocs,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="([d ref='Behavior,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocs,PeriodCount' player='0'/]) * Behavior,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocsDoT,Period * Effect,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocsImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and slows its target by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 *Behavior,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocs,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyMarchoftheMurlocs,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Murlocs deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyMarchOfTheMurlocsNeverEndingMurlocs: March of the Murlocs can be channeled indefinitely, and will always last its base duration when canceled early. </n></n>In addition, it no longer deals reduced damage to Structures.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyOctoGrab: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,OctoGrabStun,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds while he hits them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,OctoGrabPokeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage a second.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyOctoGrabAndASharkTooTalent: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,OctoGrabPokeMasteryDamage,Amount * 100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyPufferfish: Spit out a Pufferfish with health at the target point. After seconds, the fish will blow up for damage. Deals % less damage to Structures.Quest: Kill Slimed Enemies or hit them with Pufferfish. Heroes and Structures award 4 bonus stacks.Reward: After obtaining 200 stacks, Murky's Basic Abilities no longer deal reduced damage to structures.Mythic Reward: After obtaining 400 stacks, Murky's health is increased by 50%.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyPufferfishTufferfishTalent: Pufferfish gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyPufferfishTufferfishTalentCarry,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MurkyPufferfishDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage to Slimed targets.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyPufferfishWrathOfCodTalent: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Effect,MurkyPufferfishWrathOfCodTalentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life])*Behavior,MurkyPufferfishWrathofCodTalentDoT,Duration"/>%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkyPufferfishWrathofCodTalentDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MurkyRejuvenatingBubbleTalent: Safety Bubble restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MurkySafetyBubbleCreateRejuvenatingBubbleMasteryHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*[d ref='Behavior,MurkySafetyBubble,PeriodCount' player='0'/]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of Murky's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.MurkySafetyBubble: Becomes Invulnerable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MurkySafetyBubble,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. While active, Murky cannot attack or use abilities.

Structures take <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage.

Murky only grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of a real Hero's experience upon dying.<n/><n/>If Murky's Egg is killed, he is revealed to enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds, and Spawn Egg is placed on cooldown.
